reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio que no ofrece limpieza de vidrios ni ópticas, se circula por ruta, es lo minimo!!!!... ningún control de aceite ni agua...

(Translated by Google)
This gas station doesn't offer windshield or headlight cleaning, and you drive on the highway—that's the bare minimum! They don't even check the oil or water levels.

reviews.comment:
Perfecto lugar para parar, buen shop para algo rápido, el motel muy bueno, limpio, muy buena calefacción y agua caliente, un restaurante al lado de la YPF que se come bien y a buen precio. Para tener en cuenta

(Translated by Google)
Perfect place to stop, good shop for a quick bite, the motel is very good, clean, with excellent heating and hot water, and a restaurant next to the YPF gas station where you can eat well at a good price. Worth considering.
